# Tse Kung Fu Academy

> Tse Kung Fu Academy teaches traditional Southern Chinese martial arts — Choy Lee Fut and Choi Mok Pai — in Sydney, Australia. Classes run for adults, youth, and children at Marsfield Park and outside PCYC Waitara on the North Shore. Taught by Sifu Angus Tse, a lifelong martial artist with over 20 years of Choy Lee Fut experience, trained under Grand Master Chu Shiu Ki.

## Classes

- [Adult & Youth Kung Fu Classes](https://sydneykungfu.au/kungfu-classes-adults-sydney.html): Traditional Kung Fu for ages 14 and up. Covers self-defence, traditional forms, pad work, and conditioning. $80/month or $25 per class.
- [Kids Kung Fu Classes](https://sydneykungfu.au/kungfu-classes-kids-sydney.html): Structured Kung Fu for children aged 6–14. Builds confidence, discipline, fitness, and practical self-defence. $60/month or $20 per class.
- [Preschool Kung Fu](https://sydneykungfu.au/preschool-kung-fu-sydney.html): Introductory program for young children to develop coordination, focus, and movement.
- [Kids School Holiday Activities](https://sydneykungfu.au/kids-school-holiday-activities-sydney.html): Kung Fu holiday programs for kids during school breaks in Sydney.
- [Book a Free Trial](https://sydneykungfu.au/enroll.html): All new students get a free trial class — no payment required. Includes FAQ on pricing, schedule, and locations.

## Schedule & Locations

- **Tuesday evenings**: 6:00 PM – 7:00 PM, outside PCYC Waitara, NSW 2077 (North Shore Sydney)
- **Saturday mornings**: 9:30 AM – 1:00 PM, Marsfield Park, NSW 2122

## Online Classes

- [Online Private Kung Fu Classes](https://sydneykungfu.au/online-private-class.html): One-on-one private classes conducted via video call. Available globally.

## About

- [About Sifu Angus Tse](https://sydneykungfu.au/about-sifu-angus.html): Biography and martial arts background of the head instructor.
- [About Choi Mok Pai](https://sydneykungfu.au/about-choi-mok-pai.html): Overview of the Choi Mok Pai Southern Shaolin system.
- [Choy Lee Fut History](https://sydneykungfu.au/choyleefut-history.html): History of Choy Lee Fut, founded by Chan Heung in the 19th century.
- [Kung Fu Movements Reference](https://sydneykungfu.au/kungfu-movements.html): Searchable list of Choy Lee Fut movements with Chinese names and Cantonese pronunciations.
- [Grand Masters Lineage](https://sydneykungfu.au/about-grandmaster-founder-chanheung.html): Lineage from founder Chan Heung through to Sifu Angus Tse.

## FAQ

**Is the first class free?** Yes. All new students get a free trial class with no payment required.

**How much do classes cost?** Adults (14+): $80/month or $25 per class. Kids (6–14): $60/month or $20 per class. Family discounts available.

**What style of Kung Fu is taught?** Choy Lee Fut (powerful strikes and fluid footwork) and Choi Mok Pai (close-range combat and explosive power) — both traditional Southern Chinese martial arts.

**Where are classes held?** Saturday classes at Marsfield Park, NSW 2122. Tuesday evening classes outside PCYC Waitara, NSW 2077.
